############## SO4_3312  dataset Description#########################################################
#         SO4_3312 is a dataset of 3312 Non-redundant PDB chain of SO4 interacting protein chains.             
#         This dataset is generated by Blastclust (25%) and LPC software.
#         PDB resolution is maximum 3 Angstrom and PDB chain length is minimum 80 amino acid.
#         and interaction distance (distance between SO4 - amino acid interaction) is 0-4.0 Angstrom.
#         There are three line in each PDB, First line is PDB ID with chain,                    
#         Second is  amino acid sequence in single letter code                                  
#         and third line is assignment of SO4 at each amino acid residue           
#         corresponding to amino acid of respective PDB sequence, where plus (+) sign indicate  
#         the corresponding amino acid occur in SO4 interacting site  while sign(-) indicates       
#         non SO4 interacting amino acid residues.                                              
#################### Dataset Description end    ##################################################
